scripts.db:migrate-new: bash -c 'TIMESTAMP=$(date -u +%Y%m%d%H%M%S) && NAME=${1:-migration} && DIR=prisma/migrations/${TIMESTAMP}_${NAME} && mkdir -p $DIR && prisma migrate diff --from-schema-datasource prisma/schema.prisma --to-schema-datamodel prisma/schema.prisma --script > $DIR/migration.sql && echo "Migration created: $DIR/migration.sql"'
